allow: Bash(mkdir -p api components config constants context hooks layouts lib pages)
Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); const yt = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\)\); console.log\(yt\)")

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); const yt = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('video'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('play'\)\); console.log\(yt.slice\(0,15\)\)")
